orientation.core_insight: sigma-TAP models PRAXIS (how agents become through action) via the L-matrix. Four channels: L11=self-self, L12=self-other, L21=other-self, L22=env-env. Philosophical sources (Levinas, Sartre, D&G, Emery-Trist) independently converge on this 4-channel structure — that convergence is the user's key claim.
orientation.practical_warning: Do NOT introduce novel claims or impose ABM assumptions. Terminological precision matters deeply. When in doubt, quote the user's terms back rather than paraphrasing.
